mapper.sql: cast(ui.id as char) as interaction_id, cast(ui.target_id as char) as target_id, ui.target_type as target_type, ui.action_type as action_type, cast(ui.folder_id as char) as folder_id, f.name as folder_name
from user_interaction ui left join favorites f on ui.folder_id = f.id and f.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
select * from ( select , a.title as title, null as brand, null as cover_image, a.status as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join article a on ui.target_id = a.id and a.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 1 and (a.status = 1 or a.user_id = #{userId})
union all
select , h.name as title, h.brand as brand, h.cover_image as cover_image, null as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join hardware h on ui.target_id = h.id and h.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 2
union all
select , b.title as title, null as brand, b.cover_image as cover_image, b.status as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join user_builds b on ui.target_id = b.id and b.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 3 and (b.is_public = 1 or b.user_id = #{userId})
union all
select , left(c.content, 80) as title, null as brand, null as cover_image, null as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join `comment` c on ui.target_id = c.id and c.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 4 ) t order by t.create_time desc

select , a.title as title, null as brand, null as cover_image, a.status as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join article a on ui.target_id = a.id and a.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 1 and (a.status = 1 or a.user_id = #{userId}) order by ui.create_time desc

select , h.name as title, h.brand as brand, h.cover_image as cover_image, null as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join hardware h on ui.target_id = h.id and h.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 2 order by ui.create_time desc

select , b.title as title, null as brand, b.cover_image as cover_image, b.status as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join user_builds b on ui.target_id = b.id and b.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 3 and (b.is_public = 1 or b.user_id = #{userId}) order by ui.create_time desc

select , left(c.content, 80) as title, null as brand, null as cover_image, null as target_status, ui.create_time as create_time
inner join `comment` c on ui.target_id = c.id and c.is_deleted = 0 where
and ui.target_type = 4 order by ui.create_time desc
